message:
chore: Apply linter formatting to olmocr_cli.py and web/app.js

Applied automatic linter formatting updates:
- Fixed import organization in olmocr_cli.py
- Enhanced stdout handling with proper null check
- Improved readline error handling with explicit stdout assignment
- Fixed indentation and formatting in web/app.js
- Enhanced event panel initialization and error handling
